blended.narrative: Big Sky is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 43°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 7.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 7" over the past week. Current depth: 60".
